title: Siren Head: The Siren's Attacker (Java Port) Horror Mod
description: Siren Head from the Bedrock add-on has been added to this Java mod. Horror mod.
body:
![Siren Head: The Siren's Attacker](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a09287e01feb153767ea16ea69c7d341ae30a58c.png)

![Geckolib](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/98980ef757395549c1ba67df49208e5b9ce60827.webp)

This mod is a Java port of the Bedrock add-on of the same name by [Kyrie Guinto](https://www.youtube.com/@TKyrie)

Feedback: https://www.curseforge.com/members/megagatus/projects

Siren Head: The Siren's Attacker brought the terrifying entity Siren Head from Trevor Henderson's universe into Minecraft.

Siren Head:

- It spawns naturally at night.
- It targets Players, Villagers, and Iron Golem.
- Its health is 800 and it deals considerable damage.
![Siren Head](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b7fd3ccac3ef33b3c0fb1b5b5412f3a1e06c4edb_0.webp)
- Its speed is very fast.
- It's quite difficult to spot in the dark.
- It can constantly track you and launch surprise attacks.
- Its attack has a wide range and sends surrounding targets flying a considerable distance.
- It can control the weather.

Siren Head's Despawn Mechanism: 
<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

Siren Head will chase the target for over 1 minute before despawning.

</details>

This mod can be played in both single-player and multiplayer modes and it features achievement. 

Creators:
- megagatus
- ExonarithMC
- [Kyrie Guinto](https://www.youtube.com/@TKyrie)
- Vich
- dbzm
